name: Contributor AI marker examples
description: Small, synthetic examples that show how to contribute AI-like marker candidates safely.
contribution_rules: Use synthetic or self-authored examples only.
Include false-positive guard notes for formal human writing.
Prefer neutral suggested actions over detector-bypass claims.

entries.marker: We apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused
suggested_actions: replace with a direct ownership statement
false_positive_guards: acceptable in legal or regulated incident notices

entries.marker: seamlessly integrates into your existing workflow
suggested_actions: replace generic value language with a concrete user outcome
false_positive_guards: do not flag when followed by a named product, API, or setup step

entries.marker: It is important to note that
suggested_actions: delete the transition when the sentence stands alone
false_positive_guards: allow in safety-critical warnings when emphasis is required
